content.content:
1	FROM debian:13.4
2	
3	RUN apt-get update
4	RUN apt-get install -y nodejs npm python3 python3-pip ripgrep ffmpeg gcc python3-dev libffi-dev
5	
6	COPY . /opt/hermes
7	WORKDIR /opt/hermes
8	
9	RUN pip install -e ".[all]" --break-system-packages
10	RUN npm install
11	RUN npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
12	WORKDIR /opt/hermes/scripts/whatsapp-bridge
13	RUN npm install
14	
15	WORKDIR /opt/hermes
16	RUN chmod +x /opt/hermes/docker/entrypoint.sh
17	
18	ENV HERMES_HOME=/opt/data
19	VOLUME [ "/opt/data" ]
20	ENTRYPOINT [ "/opt/hermes/docker/entrypoint.sh" ]
